item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct and treated the request as an upstream redesign problem: it proposed a unified aftersales rules entry, centralized rule maintenance, scene-specific anchors, and a rollout sequence. It did not fire a triage warning or stop the work for meta-analysis, so this negative-control case earns full reversed-scale credit."}
